gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_0_SOURCE_BRANCH_CLO: expected-limit branch closure receipt must be PASS and branch_closed=true
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_10_NO_HIDDEN_NEXT_C: terminal must stop for human/application decision with next_command_goal null
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_1_CURRENT_SURFACE_T: current surface types list must be finite and current-scope only
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_2_SURFACE_STATE_REC: surface-state record schema must include evidence, provenance, authority, capability, and terminal state
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_3_YES_NO_TRANSITION: transition table must use explicit yes/no decisions
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_4_CAPABILITY_STOP_P: capability-stop schema must expose missing object and required capability
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_5_AUTHORITY_GUARDS_: authority guards must prohibit source mutation, receipt mutation, value invention, taxonomy action, hidden command
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_6_EXPECTED_LIMIT_CL: expected-limit path must close branch without universal nonexistence overclaim
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_7_NO_VALUE_INVENTIO: protocol emits zero authorizations for value invention or taxonomy action
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_8_NO_GLOBAL_OR_FINA: protocol must be explicitly local/current-surface scoped
gate_requirements.CURRENT_SURFACE_LOOP_9_NO_R1000_RUN_OR_N: protocol build must not run R1000 or open next pressure group
